data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Predictive model for human movement in UI design.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and spacing are optimized for user actions.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Time taken to make a decision increases with more choices.
data.technical_spec: Clear hierarchies and categorization in content discovery.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects close to each other are perceived as a group.
data.technical_spec: Related video suggestions and elements grouped contextually.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: 80% of effects come from 20% of the causes, applied to feature usage.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined features in the user interface prioritize primary actions.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Each application has a complexity threshold that cannot be reduced.
data.technical_spec: Balancing feature richness with simplicity in the user interface.
